What happens if we have an electrical shutdown? And this is the thing that's connected to the patient. Well, those things have been thought of by the engineers.

We have been trained on what we need to do. For one thing, if this whole system shuts down, everything being operated by electricity, we have emergency. This is a manual brake release. We will...
